# Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new functionality
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behaviour change
- [ ] docs
- [ ] infra / ops
- [ ] perf
- [ ] test

## Affected services / packages

<!-- e.g. services/ingest-momo, packages/schemas -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (unit + integration where relevant)
- [ ] Lint / typecheck / contract checks pass locally
- [ ] No PII in logs (verified — `redact()` used)
- [ ] Docs / runbook delta if applicable
- [ ] ADR added if architectural
- [ ] Two-engineer review including service-team owner
- [ ] DPO review if touching PII tables / purpose claims

## Rollout / rollback

<!-- Any deploy gates? Migration ordering? Champion/challenger swap? -->
